clues.clue_text: What many plants do in the heat
"The skin cream you're using must be Neutrogena or CeraVe!"?
Save the Children, e.g., in brief
Molecule with the nucleotides G, U, A and C
Reach out to people born between July 23 and August 22?

Stance that resembles a ballerina on one leg
